_comment: Active model for the AI fix bot. Edited by ai-model-review.yml (monthly self-assessment) via PR. api_key_env must be one of: GH_MODELS_TOKEN (GitHub Models, free via GITHUB_TOKEN), GEMINI_API_KEY (Google Gemini), or AI_PROVIDER_KEY (generic slot for any other OpenAI-compatible provider whose key you add as a repo secret). base_url is the OpenAI-compatible root (the script appends /chat/completions).
